Name: SpEffectVfxParam
Description: All Visual Effects for Special Effects

Fields.Name: Midst SFX ID
Fields.Description: In effect SfxID (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Midst SE ID
Fields.Description: In effect SeID (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Start SFX ID
Fields.Description: SfxID at activation (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Start SE ID
Fields.Description: When activated SeID (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: End SFX ID
Fields.Description: SfxID at the time of cancellation (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: End SE ID
Fields.Description: SeID at the time of release (-1: invalid)

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Start Distance
Fields.Description: It is the camouflage start distance

Fields.Name: Camouflage - End Distance
Fields.Description: It is the camouflage end distance

Fields.Name: Transform - Protector ID
Fields.Description: Makeover Armor ID (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Midst Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: In effect Damipoli ID (-1: Root)

Fields.Name: Start Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID at the time of activation (-1: root)

Fields.Name: End Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID at the time of cancellation (-1: root)

Fields.Name: Effect Type
Fields.Description: Effect type

Fields.Name: Weapon Enchant - Soul Param ID
Fields.Description: Soul Param ID for Weapon Enchantment (-1: None). Change the applied Phantom Param.

Fields.Name: Play Category
Fields.Description: Controls effect playback due to duplicate effects

Fields.Name: Play Priority
Fields.Description: Set the playback priority when the categories match (lower one has priority)

Fields.Name: Large Effect Exists
Fields.Description: Is there a large effect?

Fields.Name: Soul Effect Exists
Fields.Description: Is there an effect for the soul body?

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Invisible while Active
Fields.Description: Whether to hide the effect when hiding

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Enable
Fields.Description: Do you hide

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Invisible for Friend
Fields.Description: Is it hidden even by allies when hiding?

Fields.Name: Camouflage - Translucent Appearance
Fields.Description: Only translucent appearance

Fields.Name: Is Full Body Protector ID
Fields.Description: Is the transformation armor ID for the whole body?

Fields.Name: Is Invisible Weapon
Fields.Description: Invisible Weapon for Weapon Enchantment (0: Weapon Show, 1: Weapon Hide)

Fields.Name: Is Silent
Fields.Description: Is it silence? (0: No, 1: Yes)

Fields.Name: Transform: Gauntlet
Fields.Description: Can I replace the gauntlet with transformation armor ID +2000?

Fields.Name: Transform: Helmet
Fields.Description: Can you transform the helmet with the transformation armor ID?

Fields.Name: Transform: Leggings
Fields.Description: Can I replace the leg ties with transformation armor ID +3000?

Fields.Name: Transform Priority
Fields.Description: Transformation priority (0: highest to 7: lowest)

Fields.Name: Transform: Weapon ID
Fields.Description: Transformation right hand weapon ID (-1: None)
